puzzleDescription: Learn how to group multiple cases together in a switch statement to produce the same output for different inputs.
objective: Input a month number (1-12) and display the season: 12, 1, 2 = Winter; 3, 4, 5 = Spring; 6, 7, 8 = Summer; 9, 10, 11 = Fall.
hints: You can stack cases like this: case 6: case 7: case 8: System.out.println("Summer"); break;
This avoids repeating the same print statement for different months.
Make sure to use 'break;' only after the group is finished.
